title: Universal Atomic Calculator (UAC) and Multiplicity Social Physics (MSP) Reproducibility Capsule
description: A self-verifying reproducibility capsule that anchors physical readouts from neutral-atom hardware simulators (e.g., Pasqal Orion) to machine-checked invariants in Lean 4. This capsule bridges quantum mechanics simulation with Multiplicity Social Physics (MSP) observables, verified end-to-end via a fail-closed Rust FFI ('Sedona Spine') executing under Phase Mirror governance.
